project.name: GraphCompose Build Aggregator
project.description:
Non-published reactor aggregator. Builds the library plus the examples and benchmarks modules in one pass and gives a single entry point for `versions:set`, so a version bump propagates to every module at once. This is NOT a Maven parent and is NOT published to JitPack: the library root pom.xml stays standalone so consumer coordinates never change.
Usage: mvn -f aggregator/pom.xml -DskipTests install # build everything mvn -f aggregator/pom.xml versions:set -DnewVersion=X # bump all modules
